constraints: File bytes MUST be read eagerly in the upload endpoint and passed to the BackgroundTask as bytes; UploadFile must never be accessed inside the background task after the request lifecycle ends.
BackgroundTask MUST open a fresh AsyncSessionLocal; it MUST NOT receive or reuse the request-scoped database session.
ImportJob record MUST be written to the database before the endpoint returns; no import state is kept in in-memory dicts.
openpyxl MUST be used with read_only=True for parsing large files; parsing MUST be run in loop.run_in_executor to avoid blocking the event loop.
Import progress MUST be persisted to ImportJob every 50 rows; per-row progress writes are forbidden.
Database connection MUST use NullPool and statement_cache_size=0 for Supabase compatibility.
Maximum upload size is 10 MB; the endpoint MUST reject oversized files with HTTP 413 before reading the full body.
Content-type validation is mandatory on upload; only application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet and text/csv are accepted.
ZIP bomb / decompression bomb detection MUST occur before any spreadsheet parsing begins.
Role-based field allowlists on PATCH MUST be enforced server-side; the client-supplied field list is never trusted.
Case creation and mark-intake-complete are restricted to intake_staff and admin; the middleware MUST enforce this before the handler executes.
All PatientCase writes MUST include updated_by_user_id from the authenticated user.
